channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nicole da Silva joins Home and Away as new doctor Amelia Carlisle
item.description: Nicole da Silva, widely recognised for her role as Franky Doyle in Wentworth, is joining the cast of Home and Away as a new character, Dr Amelia Carlisle. After months of speculation on social media, ...

item.title: Sharp rise in disability payments for anxiety prompts scrutiny of benefit coaching firms
item.description: A new investigation by The Mail on Sunday has revealed that UK taxpayers are spending approximately £800 per minute on disability benefits for individuals claiming to suffer from anxiety. Payments und...

item.title: Kano Governor’s Aides Freed on Bail After Kwankwasiyya Petition to DSS
item.description: Four key aides of Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf of Kano State, including his spokesperson Sanusi Bature Dawakin Tofa, were detained by the Department of State Services (DSS) but later released on bail aft...

item.title: Police launch appeal following assault on woman outside Epsom church
item.description: Police in Surrey have issued an urgent appeal for witnesses following a serious sexual assault on a woman outside a church in Epsom. The victim was reportedly attacked by several men in the vicinity, ...

item.title: Loss of Smell Linked to Early Alzheimer’s Immune Activity
item.description: Researchers from the German Center for Neurodegenerative Diseases (DZNE) and Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München (LMU) have discovered that losing the ability to smell may be one of the first signs...

item.title: Why the 'Putney Pusher' Case Remains Unsolved Nearly a Decade Later
item.description: Almost ten years after a shocking rush-hour assault on London’s Putney Bridge, the mystery of the 'Putney Pusher' remains unsolved. In May 2017, CCTV captured a jogger deliberately shoving a 33-year-o...

item.title: Gerda Steyn eyes tenth Two Oceans Marathon title after seventh consecutive win
item.description: South African ultra-marathon star Gerda Steyn extended her dominance at the Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon in Cape Town on Saturday, winning her seventh straight title in the women’s 56km race. Steyn...

item.title: Historical Revisionism Concerns Spark Debate over Canadian Education
item.description: A recent opinion piece in the National Post highlights a growing concern regarding the state of historical education in Canada. Author Jerry Amernic argues that a pervasive trend of historical revisio...

item.title: Artemis Mission Marks a New Era in Lunar Exploration and Future Space Travel
item.description: The Artemis program has successfully returned its Orion spacecraft crew to Earth, concluding a 10-day journey that demonstrated humanity's readiness to pursue long-term space exploration. The four ast...

item.title: Parenthood and Wellbeing: Understanding the Complex Emotional Reality
item.description: A recent study published in Evolutionary Psychology, involving over 5,000 participants across 10 countries, including Britain, suggests that having children does not consistently increase emotional we...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee alleges Centre planning to split West Bengal through delimitation
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee on Sunday accused the Central government of attempting to divide the state through a delimitation exercise. Speaking at election rallies in Chhatna and Onda ...

item.title: United Alternative Government Youth Mobilise for Voter Registration Ahead of 2027 Elections in Kiambu
item.description: In Kiambu County, the United Alternative Government Youth Command conducted a significant voter registration campaign in Ruiru constituency on April 11, 2026. Led by youth leader Ken Babu and Ruiru MP...

item.title: Boundaries Are Key to Maintaining Strong Friendships
item.description: This article explains why long-lasting friendships can’t survive without proper boundaries. Boundaries help friends understand each other’s needs and create mutual respect. Setting boundaries means le...

item.title: Young tradesman injured after Melbourne road dispute escalates
item.description: A young tradesman was seriously assaulted following a heated argument that erupted during a road rage incident in Melbourne. According to preliminary reports, the confrontation began when the two driv...

item.title: Quebec's CAQ party set to choose new premier as leadership vote concludes
item.description: Quebec is poised to welcome a new premier as the leadership race for the Coalition Avenir Québec (CAQ) wraps up this Sunday. The announcement is expected in Drummondville, Quebec, where either Christi...

item.title: Challenges Kenyan athletes face when retiring from professional sports
item.description: Kenyan sports stars often struggle with retirement, unlike their counterparts in Europe who have clear pathways. While European athletes like Dimitri Payet retire publicly and gracefully, Kenyan athle...

item.title: Social Media Influence on Young Women's Contraception Decisions
item.description: Milly Evans, a 26-year-old sex educator in the UK, recently experienced doubts about hormonal contraception despite her professional knowledge. Leading up to her decision to get a hormonal coil (IUS),...

item.title: Promoting Rainwater Harvesting for Sustainable Water Use in Tanzania
item.description: The article urges Tanzanians to take full advantage of the ongoing rainy season by harvesting and storing rainwater for future use. It emphasizes that rain is a natural blessing often wasted through p...

item.title: Tanzanian Cricket Legends Celebrate 5th Anniversary with 3-Day Reunion in Leicester
item.description: The UK city of Leicester go full of excitement as the Tanzanian Cricket Legends gather for their third reunion tour, marking five years since the group started. From May 29 to 31, 2026, the three-day ...

item.title: Trump Suggests Possible Naval Blockade of Iran Amid Rising Tensions Over Failed Diplomatic Efforts
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump recently reposted an article suggesting that he might consider imposing a naval blockade on Iran if ongoing diplomatic talks between the two nations fail. The repost...
